—Only those who are truly holy are truly happy. It is useless to pretend to be among those who fear God if we do not make a point of faithfully following his ways. Blessed is everyone who fears the Lord, whether they are important or unimportant, rich or poor in the world. If you fear him and walk in his ways, all will be well with you while you live, better when you die, best of all in eternity. By God’s blessing, the godly will earn an honest living. Here is a double promise: they will have something to do, because an idle life is miserable and uncomfortable, and they will have health and strength, and mental ability to do it. They will not be forced to live off the labor of other people. It is as much a blessing as it is a duty to work quietly and eat your own bread. You and your family will enjoy what you earn. Those who fear the Lord and walk in his ways are the only happy people, whatever their position in life may be. They will have abundant comfort in their family relationships. And they will have all the good things God has promised and which they pray for. A good person cannot have much comfort seeing their grandchildren unless they see peace upon Israel. Every true believer rejoices in the prosperity of the church. Hereafter we will see greater things, with the everlasting peace and rest that remains for the people of God.
